# OneDrive Version Tracker (Uplizd) - Automated document history and recovery

## Summary
The OneDrive Version Tracker is an intelligent Uplizd AI workflow designed to automate document version control, monitor file changes, and facilitate rapid rollbacks. By leveraging the Composio Toolset to interface with Microsoft OneDrive, this solution provides teams with a single source of truth for file integrity, ensuring that critical data is never lost and that pipeline velocity remains high by eliminating manual version auditing.

---
